OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKSON & WALLACE, LLP

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS-DEFENDANT G E CAPITAL INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INCORPORATED'S DBA IKON FINANCIAL SERVICES' DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OF JACKSON & WALLACE. LLP IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. EVEN IF THE DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION OF ITS EXHIBIT G WERE REASONABLE, IT AT MOST PLEADS A DISPUTE AS OF 2005, NOT A CURRENT DISPUTE. ESPECIALLY IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S SUBSEQUENT PLEADINGS THAT ESTABLISH AND LIMIT PLAINTIFF'S ACTUAL CLAIMS. IN ANY EVENT, THE ISSUES AND DECLARATORY RELIEF SOUGHT ARE ENCOMPASSED WITHIN AND DUPLICATIVE OF BOTH DEFENDANT'S FIRST AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE & ITS FRAUD CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
CROSS-DEFENDANT G E CAPITAL INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INCORPORATED'S dba IKON FINANCIAL SERVICES' DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OF JACKSON & WALLACE. LLP IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. EVEN IF THE DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION OF ITS EXHIBIT G WERE REASONABLE, IT AT MOST PLEADS A DISPUTE AS OF 2005, NOT A CURRENT DISPUTE. ESPECIALLY IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S SUBSEQUENT PLEADINGS THAT ESTABLISH AND LIMIT PLAINTIFF'S ACTUAL CLAIMS. IN ANY EVENT, THE ISSUES AND DECLARATORY RELIEF SOUGHT ARE ENCOMPASSED WITHIN AND DUPLICATIVE OF BOTH DEFENDANT'S FIRST AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE & ITS FRAUD CAUSES OF ACTION. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/LB)
